geography.data_source: Greater Chennai Corporation ward map 2022, GCC boundary shapefiles for Adyar-Velachery-Guindy zone

demographics.data_source: Census 2011 Chennai district tables, high literacy driven by IIT Madras/Anna University belt, estimated growth at 1.5% CAGR

income_profile.data_source: NSSO 78th Round (2020-21) Tamil Nadu urban tables, PLFS 2022-23, adjusted upward for Adyar-Velachery educational institution belt

commute_profile.data_source: CMRL Green Line ridership 2023, Southern Railway Tambaram line suburban data, CMP Chennai 2018 mode share adjusted for metro expansion

sensitivity_parameters.data_source: Estimated from higher-income zone behaviour patterns, high examination sensitivity due to IIT/Anna University student population, Lokniti-CSDS 2024

social_network_parameters.data_source: Estimated from educational institution network effects, professional networking patterns in South Chennai

informal_economy_nodes.data_source: Estimated from Adyar market zone commercial activity survey
Estimated from Velachery metro station area footfall, CMRL station exit surveys 2023
Estimated from IIT Madras/Anna University gate area vendor activity

tier1_agent_archetype_weights.data_source: Adjusted Middle Income Residential (higher) template for South Chennai's educational institution concentration, elevated student and tech worker weights

tier2_agent_types.data_source: Estimated from GCC ward councillor count, IIT/Anna University institutional presence, TNPSC coaching concentration
